root_text.an5.253:1.1: “Pañcahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgatena bhikkhunā sāmaṇero upaṭṭhāpetabbo.
root_text.an5.253:1.3: Idha, bhikkhave, bhikkhu asekhena sīlakkhandhena samannāgato hoti; asekhena samādhikkhandhena … asekhena paññākkhandhena … asekhena vimuttikkhandhena … asekhena vimuttiñāṇadassanakkhandhena samannāgato hoti.
root_text.an5.253:1.4: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahi dhammehi samannāgatena bhikkhunā sāmaṇero upaṭṭhāpetabbo”ti.

translation_text.an5.253:0.3: Who Should Have a Novice as Attendant
translation_text.an5.253:1.1: “Mendicants, a novice should attend on a mendicant with five qualities.
translation_text.an5.253:1.3: It’s a mendicant who has the entire spectrum of an adept’s ethics, immersion, wisdom, freedom, and the knowledge and vision of freedom.
translation_text.an5.253:1.4: A novice should attend on a mendicant with these five qualities.”
